chapter_title.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ الَّتِي تَحْرُمُ عَلَى الرَّجُلِ فَلَا تَحِلُّ لَهُ أَبَداً
chapter_title.en: Chapter 81 – The woman who is Prohibited unto the man, so she is not Permissible for him, ever

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/189)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/189)
text: إِذَا طَلَّقَ الرَّجُلُ الْمَرْأَةَ فَتَزَوَّجَتْ رَجُلًا ثُمَّ طَلَّقَهَا فَتَزَوَّجَهَا الْأَوَّلُ ثُمَّ طَلَّقَهَا فَتَزَوَّجَتْ رَجُلًا ثُمَّ طَلَّقَهَا فَتَزَوَّجَهَا الْأَوَّلُ ثُمَّ طَلَّقَهَا لَمْ تَحِلَّ لَهُ أَبَداً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Jameel Bin Darraj,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When the man divorces the woman, so a man marries her. Then he divorces her, so the first (husband) marries her. Then he divorces her, so a man marries her. Then he divorces her, so the first (husband) marries her. Then he divorces her, she would not be Permissible for him, ever’.
en.sarwar: 13. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Jamil ibn Darraj who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If a man divorces a woman, then she marries a man then he divorces her then she marries the first man then divorces her and she marries a man then divorces her then she marries the first man then he divorces her, she becomes unlawful for him forever.’”
